summary: The customer had an unexpected fee on their account, which was resolved by the agent. The agent also provided guidance on how to avoid the fee in the future.
resolution: Use a warmer sign-off phrase, such as 'Thank you for your patience. Have a great day.'

empathy_phrases_used: I can help you with that

model_metrics.notes: Model performed well in this scenario

improvements.suggestion: Use a warmer sign-off phrase, such as 'Thank you for your patience. Have a great day.'
improvements.example: Thank you for your patience. Have a great day.

improvements.suggestion: Provide more detailed explanations of the issue and the resolution, to help the customer understand the situation better
improvements.example: The maintenance fee was charged because your account balance dropped below the minimum required amount. To avoid this in the future, you can keep your balance above the minimum or set up direct deposit.

highlights: The agent resolved the customer's issue efficiently and provided clear guidance on how to avoid the fee in the future.
